name: Drag back to anchor line — selection must not collapse on different positions
description: User-reported regression: anchor on a wrapped line, drag to a lower line (selection works), drag back to a DIFFERENT position on the anchor line — selection collapses. Causes: (1) inter-line gap below anchor x — fixed by snapping to line-break boundary; (2) recomputed char_offset on the anchor line could equal the anchor offset for unrelated mouse positions if the rect/block math is wrong. This test exercises both: drag down to line 2, drag back via the gap below the anchor x (case 1), then continue back to several distinct positions on line 1 that are NOT the anchor (case 2).

events.message: Drag UP into gap straight below anchor x — must remain non-collapsed (gap snap)
Continue UP onto line 1 at distinct positions LEFT of anchor
And distinct positions to the RIGHT of anchor still on line 1
